description_long: This is a luxurious, classic armchair upholstered in deep burgundy leather with a high, winged backrest. The backrest features a tufted diamond pattern with buttons, giving it a traditional Chesterfield appearance. The armrests are rolled and padded, adorned with metallic nailhead trim for added elegance. The seat cushion is thick and plush, providing ample comfort, and appears removable. The legs are short, curved, and made of dark polished wood, adding to the vintage aesthetic. The overall construction suggests a sturdy wooden frame with soft cushioning and leather covering, suitable for upscale urban interiors or stylish outdoor lounges.
description: A classic burgundy leather armchair with a tufted, high backrest, rolled armrests, and curved wooden legs. Features plush cushioning and elegant nailhead trim.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the high, winged, and slightly curved backrest with smooth leather finish.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the rolled, padded armrest, thick seat cushion, and curved wooden leg.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the tufted diamond backrest, plush seat cushion, rolled armrests, and nailhead trim.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the armrest, seat cushion, and wooden leg profile.
attribute_armrest_design: rolled and padded, upholstered in leather with nailhead trim
attribute_backrest_style: high, winged, tufted diamond pattern with buttons
